translated: Joseph was sold by his brothers, and they took his coat and threw it into a pit. Then they went and told their father that Joseph had been killed by a wild animal. Joseph, however, was not killed.

ref: who said, “You have already taken my sons Joseph and Simeon from me. And now you want to take away Benjamin! Everything is against me.”
text: Ni ame̱tše̱ Iakob kē̱ame̱ ake̱: Nyekpakpā mibii ye̱ mihe: Iosef be̱, ni Simeon be̱, ni nyebaṅõ Benyamin hũ ke̱-ya; ene̱mei ne̱ fẽ le̱ mino̱ kã!
translated: Then Jacob called his sons and said: "Joseph, Simeon, and my youngest son Benjamin, come here to me!"
